# REQUEST FOR AN EXTENSION OF TIME TO FILE A FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE REPORT

Name: Rohit Khanna. Report type: Annual. Calendar year/termination date: 2023. The filer requests a 90-day extension because a 30-day extension had been granted and additional time was needed to complete the paper form. Received stamp: Legislative Resource Center, 2024 APR 23 AM 11:16. Copy sent to Legislative Resource Center on 2024-04-23. The scan is upside down.

uncertainties.note: OCR source is upside down; free text transcribed from rotated visual/OCR.
Audit repair: normalized nonstandard page_type 'extension_request' to schema value 'letter'.
